title: Verify the Loss Aversion modal correctly emphasizes the primary action
description: Tests the UI of the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up to ensure the desired user behavior is encouraged through visual design.
preconditions: User is in an active trial and belongs to the target cohort.
expected_result: The 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' button is visually more prominent (e.g., solid color) than the 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access' button (e.g., ghost button/text).
